text: Welcome, helper_alex! Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Moderator role. Thanks for stepping up to help keep the community safe — please check out the mod guidelines in #mod-handbook and feel free to reach out if you have questions. Glad to have you!

Welcome, guide_sam! You're in — approved as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you helping shape community events. Head over to #events-team to get started, and don't hesitate to ask if you need anything!

Welcome, newbie_kim! Your application has been approved and you've joined as a Member. Take a look around, introduce yourself in #introductions, and let us know if you have any questions. Happy to have you here!

Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a Mentor — we're thrilled to have someone with your experience on board. Check out #mentor-lounge to connect with the team, and feel free to reach out anytime. Looking forward to seeing the impact you'll have!
